name: record
description: Render a member's real merge history from this repo's own history: for each merged skill, the commit SHA, date, skill name, and one-line description.

filter.description: case-insensitive substring; matches a commit author name/email (git mode) or a github_login/member_id/wallet (record mode). Omit to list every merge.

github_login.description: real attribution only in record mode; in git mode git has no login, so this is declined honestly via a caveat

wallet.description: real attribution only in record mode; git history carries no wallet, so this is declined honestly in git mode

path.description: path to a canonical record.jsonl; default: maintainer/record.jsonl (absent at genesis, so git history is used)

entries.description: already-loaded canonical record entries, used instead of reading a file (record mode)

commits.description: already-loaded git commit objects, used instead of shelling out to git (git mode; for tests)

repoRoot.description: repo root override; default is two levels up from this skill

source.description: "record" (canonical hash-chained record) or "git" (honest interim source read from git history)

merges.description: newest-first; each: { source, sha, sha_short, date, skills:[{name,description}], subject, author_name, author_email, github_login, member_id, wallet, wallet_short, pr, held_z_at_merge } — fields null when the source cannot honestly provide them

filter.description: the filter actually applied, or null

caveats.description: honest notes about what this source can and cannot attribute
